flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Southern Wesleyan University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (771 vs 1.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Wesleyan University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (941 → 747).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Wesleyan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.5k → $29.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Wesleyan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.5k → $29.8k).
